$comment: Production config. Swap backends in; no code changes. Secrets via env, never here. The gate seed lives in gate_seed_file (git-ignored) or $OMAKASE_GATE_SEED — a committed gate seed is a published answer key.

metagraph.$comment: validator enforces zero changes to hotkey↔github pairing; bind on immutable githubId

$sandbox_comment: Untrusted PR code runs here. 'docker' = no network, read-only FS, nobody uid. Use 'process' + allow_unisolated_gate only on a runner that holds no signing key.
